posts.name: Powabase
posts.tagline: Build AI apps with Postgres, RAG, and agents
posts.description: Powabase is a backend-as-a-service for AI-native applications, combining Postgres, RAG, agents, memory, workflows, and automation primitives in one platform. It helps agencies and in-house IT teams build new AI apps or add AI automation to existing products without stitching together fragmented infrastructure. Designed to work seamlessly with modern coding agents, Powabase helps teams ship faster while building more robust, token-efficient systems.

posts.name: Bluedot 2.1
posts.tagline: Record on Apple Watch. Sync with Claude
posts.description: Bluedot 2.1 brings your real-world conversations into Claude. Record conversations directly from your Apple Watch, then sync them with Claude through MCP. Capture customer calls, hallway chats, interviews, coffee meetings, and in-person conversations, without a laptop or meeting bot. Bluedot turns every conversation into searchable, AI-ready context that Claude can summarize, search, and act on.

posts.name: zero.xyz
posts.tagline: Give your AI agent access to ~8k tools, APIs and services
posts.description: **Product Hunt: Claim $5 at zero.xyz, the free power tool for AI agents** Zero unblocks your agents so they can discover services to accomplish tasks, no APIs keys or config. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenClaw, Hermes and most other CLI agents. Make your agents better with Zero.

posts.name: Oasis Browser for Mac
posts.tagline: A privacy-first AI browser you can train anonymously
posts.description: Oasis is a refuge from noisy, scattered browsing. Privacy comes first, in an elegant experience that AI makes feel lighter and more capable, not busier. Your data is your data. Period. As you train Oasis on what matters to you, it grows sharper, quicker, and truer to your everyday flow.

posts.name: Coworker AI
posts.tagline: More AI for less spend with context-aware model routing
posts.description: Same AI. 5x the tokens. Coworker provides deep company context and automatically routes to the right model for every task. More chat, cowork and code with the same spend.

posts.name: Octolane
posts.tagline: Self-driving AI CRM that you can talk to
posts.description: Octolane is chat-first Self-driving AI CRM: say "follow up with David" or "show me stuck deals" and it does the thing. self-driving underneath. reads your gmail and calendar, auto-detects deals, drafts follow-ups, updates fields. What's new: slash-command chat, meeting recorder, visitor signal, kanban pipeline, MCP server with ~60 tools.

posts.name: Mojito
posts.tagline: Type to search for any emoji, symbol, or gif in seconds
posts.description: Autocomplete :emoji: everywhere on macOS. Type a colon and search any emoji, symbol, or shortcode in seconds — in TextEdit, iMessage, Terminal, anywhere. Slack and a few other apps have this — type :heart: and you get ❤️. It makes finding emoji easy. I wanted it everywhere on my Mac, so I built Mojito. It works just like you'd expect, and it's smart enough to ignore apps and sites that already support it. And it's free, open-source donationware.

posts.name: Layers
posts.tagline: Create beautiful animated code snippet videos for free
posts.description: Layers is a free web-based tool that empowers anyone to create beautiful, animated code snippet videos. Inspired by sites like Carbon, Layers features a customizable code editor, support for popular languages, various aspect ratios, and texture super sampling for high-resolution animations. With Layers, you can also adjust the orientation and perspective of your code snippets, allowing for dramatic compositions that can be used for more advanced editing, motion graphics, and content creation.

posts.name: Calling Skills for AI Agents
posts.tagline: Add voice and video calling via your coding agent
posts.description: HD voice and video calling by CometChat, built to fit into and grow with your platform. Packed with recording, screen sharing, call logs, raise hand, broadcast mode, picture-in-picture, and more. Integrate via UI Kits, SDKs, or a single npx command (npx @cometchat/skills add) using CometChat Skills. Scales with heavy bandwidth, compliant with global standards, and built for developers.

posts.name: Pawse.ai
posts.tagline: An acoustic regulation system for dogs
posts.description: Most dogs left alone for four or more hours show measurable stress responses. Most apps respond with playlists. Pawse.ai is an acoustic regulation system for dogs. It plays scientifically structured audio through your Apple TV or iPad while you're out, frequencies and patterns calibrated for canine hearing, not human preference. You start and stop it from your phone, anywhere. BETA TestFlight links live on https://pawse.ai Five modes: Sleep, Home Alone, Loud Noise, Travel, and Vet Visit.

posts.name: Krater
posts.tagline: All the AI tools you use, one subscription
posts.description: Krater turns AI from something you try into something you use. Every AI model, every modality, every app you use, combined into one chat and driven by one agent. Tell it what you need in plain language and it gets it done; whatever you're building, studying, running or creating. The same agent that chats with you can generate an image, edit a video, produce a song, automate your apps, and publish a full website, all in one flow. 70K+ users. API access. Replaces $100+/mo in subscriptions.

posts.name: BaseBuddy
posts.tagline: Turn your Supabase database into a WordPress-like editor
posts.description: BaseBuddy is an open-source Supabase CMS and self-hosted editor for existing Supabase and Postgres databases.

posts.name: baz.studio
posts.tagline: Skills library & video editor for AI Agents
posts.description: Baz Studio is an AI-native video production platform for humans and AI agents. Today we’re launching Skills: the world’s largest library of open-source video workflows for AI. Turn pitch decks into videos, codebases into launch videos, and blog posts into content series. Run Baz directly inside Claude, Codex, or any AI coding agent using the CLI, and watch full video productions appear inside the Baz Studio web UI.

posts.name: CircadiaOS
posts.tagline: Sleep optimization, minus the $3,000 mattress pod
posts.description: CircadiaOS is software-only sleep optimization. No mattress pod, no proprietary sensor, no new hardware. It connects the wearable and smart thermostat you already own, builds a personalized overnight temperature schedule from your biometrics, and runs your thermostat through it automatically every night. Most premium sleep tech in this category has been hardware-first: thousand-dollar mattress pods, dedicated sensors, custom firmware. We took the opposite bet.

posts.name: Netfox
posts.tagline: A native local macOS network monitor
posts.description: A native macOS network monitor. Combines Bonjour, ARP, SSDP, NetBIOS and active probing to show every connected device — Apple gadgets, smart TVs, IoT, printers — in one live window. Full per-device history: first seen, last seen, every online/offline transition. Five alert types for new, risky, or returning devices. One-click security scan checks common ports with plain-English findings. Built 100% in SwiftUI. No cloud, no account, no telemetry. Your data stays on your Mac. Free.

posts.name: Extend
posts.tagline: Parse any PDF layout with SOTA accuracy for AI pipelines
posts.description: Parse, extract, and split your hardest documents with unmatched accuracy. Read any layout with specialized vision models, and ship reliable pipelines in minutes, not months.

posts.name: Phasr
posts.tagline: Run 100+ workflows simultaneously without losing context
posts.description: Phasr is a workspace orchestration platform for engineers and AI-assisted development. Spin up and manage dozens of parallel coding workflows, terminals, agents, and repositories from one place. Whether you're debugging production issues, running multi-repo changes, reviewing AI-generated code, or managing large-scale development tasks, Phasr helps you move faster without context switching.

posts.name: Cotypist
posts.tagline: Local AI Autocomplete in your voice, anywhere on your Mac
posts.description: Cotypist is smart autocomplete for the Mac apps you already write in: Mail, Slack, Notes, docs, even AI prompts. Press Tab when a suggestion fits, or keep typing and watch it update in real time. Runs locally on your Mac. No cloud, no API calls.

posts.name: Archi-Flow
posts.tagline: Visualize cloud architecture with live traffic simulations
posts.description: Archi-Flow brings your cloud architecture to life. Instead of looking at static diagrams, you can design interactive cloud architecture maps featuring real-time live traffic simulations. Perfect for system design reviews, debugging data flows, onboarding engineers, and presenting complex architectures with clarity. Built to bridge the gap between design and reality.

posts.name: QuickSheet v1.2
posts.tagline: Instantly create and edit spreadsheets from your menu bar
posts.description: QuickSheet is a tiny, instant spreadsheet that lives in your Mac's menu bar. One shortcut and you're crunching numbers, no need to open Numbers. Real formulas (SUM, IF, COUNT), conditional formatting, freeze rows/columns, formula-preserving paste from Sheets & Excel, CSV import/export, and Paste & Clean Table for messy web copy. No signup, no subscription, no ads, no data collected - ever. Everything stays local on your Mac. Free for life.

posts.name: Local Panel
posts.tagline: Local SSH server manager with no subscriptions or installs
posts.description: LocalPanel is a powerful desktop application that lets you manage any SSH-accessible server directly from your computer. No agents, no bloat, and nothing installed on your remote machines — just a clean, local app that puts complete server control at your fingertips.

posts.name: BobCA
posts.tagline: A sovereign agent that learns to code with your preferences
posts.description: Most AI assistants are just glorified autocomplete. BobCA gives you a sovereign digital workforce. Using your learned engineering DNA, set grading targets in Mission Control, and let your digital twin autonomously debug, refactor, and build in the background. It logs negative constraints so it never repeats a mistake. Track every bug crushed and feature shipped live on the Autonomy HUD. Stop explaining your codebase and start managing your twin.

posts.name: BankStatementLab
posts.tagline: Turn any bank statement PDF into Excel, CSV or JSON with AI
posts.description: BankStatementLab uses AI to extract transactions from any bank statement PDF in the world. Upload your file, get clean structured data in seconds — ready to use in Excel, CSV, or JSON. No manual data entry. Works with any bank, any format, any language. Perfect for accountants, bookkeepers, financial analysts, and businesses that need to digitize bank statements at scale. Start free with 5 pages included.

posts.name: Jott
posts.tagline: Capture quick written or voice notes from your Mac's notch
posts.description: Jott lives in your Mac's notch. Double-tap Option, type, it autosaves, you're back. No windows, no switching apps, no losing your place. Everything syncs to iPhone over iCloud so your notes follow you everywhere. One-time purchase on both Mac and iOS. Free 7-day trial. No subscription, ever. Actively maintained.

posts.name: Aviquill
posts.tagline: A calm canvas for visual thinkers with messy minds
posts.description: Most note-taking apps force your thoughts into rigid folders, endless pages, and linear structure. Aviquill helps you organize ideas more naturally — so projects feel clearer, research feels less overwhelming, and creative work can flow without getting lost in clutter. Built for visual thinkers who want a calmer, more flexible workspace where ideas can grow, connect, and make sense.

posts.name: Chunk sidecars
posts.tagline: Validate agent-generated code before it ever reaches CI
posts.description: AI agents write code fast. Validation still happens after the push — by then the context is gone. Chunk sidecars run scoped microbuilds before commit, in a real CI mirror. Auto-detects your stack. ~27s average vs ~5 min billable compute for a full run. 3x–5x fewer tokens in retry loops. If something fails, the agent iterates before anything reaches shared CI. Run chunk init. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or custom agents. Free for all CircleCI users.

posts.name: GenGo
posts.tagline: Transform selected text anywhere on macOS
posts.description: Gengo is a macOS utility that transforms selected text instantly using AI. Select text anywhere on your Mac, describe what you want, and Gengo replaces it in place. Turn GitHub URLs into GitHub Pages URLs, convert Japanese into natural English, generate terminal commands, format SQL, create TypeScript types from JSON, and much more — without switching apps or breaking your workflow.

posts.name: Harbor
posts.tagline: CLI + companion App to spin up complete local LLM stacks
posts.description: Harbor saves you dozens of hours configuring your local AI stack. One command spins up LLM backends, chat frontends, web search, voice, image gen, fine-tuning, agent tools - all pre-configured to talk to each other. Manage your downloaded models, create config profiles, use agentic coding tools with your local LLMs, and much more.

posts.name: MacSIM by Studio Practice
posts.tagline: Preview any URL on every Mac screen at once
posts.description: Paste any URL. See it rendered across all six common Mac display sizes — MacBook Air 13 and 15, MacBook Pro 14 and 16, iMac 24, and Studio Display 5K — stacked, scaled, and labeled. The notch and menu bar are where Apple puts them, so what you see matches a real fullscreen browser. Single HTML file. No signup, no tracking, no build step. Works with localhost. Download once and it runs offline forever.

posts.name: Curlo
posts.tagline: Local AI search to find SFX and music by describing it
posts.description: Curlo is a privacy-first macOS app for searching, previewing, and organizing large sound libraries. Find SFX or music by describing what you want to hear, search for similar sounds, edit metadata & UCS, manage tags, and keep everything fully local on your Mac.

posts.name: AgenticCalling AI
posts.tagline: Give your AI the power to make phone calls
posts.description: Give your AI a dedicated phone number and the power to make calls. AgenticCalling lets Claude, ChatGPT, OpenClaw or any custom agent execute unscripted, goal-oriented calls. We handle the messy infra - Numbers, A2P, IVRs, voicemails, & retries. Your agent dials out, navigates conversations, and returns clean JSON data. Built for action: rate shopping, negotiations, & real-world execution. Just say: “Hey Claude, call my mom at +1-786786786 and tell her I love her!”

posts.name: Supersleep
posts.tagline: Improve your sleep, don't just track it
posts.description: Supersleep is a sleep habit app for people tired of turning sleep into a performance. Instead of scores and endless metrics, it focuses on simple, science-based habits, gentle reminders, and realistic routines that help you sleep better over time. Works with or without a wearable and integrates with Apple Health.

posts.name: Rival Charts
posts.tagline: Create stunning chart races 🚀 📊 that go viral!
posts.description: Create stunning interactive bar chart races in seconds 🚀 Stop publishing static charts. Turn boring numbers into videos people actually watch, share, and remember. Upload your data. Pick a theme. Rival transforms stats into beautiful MP4 videos or interactive HTML experiences - instantly. Perfect for journalists, creators, analysts, and anyone who wants data to stop people scrolling.

posts.name: Zoomr
posts.tagline: Turn any screen recording into a polished product demo
posts.description: Zoomr is a lightweight screen recording tool that lets you record your screen with live zoom effects, drawing overlays, screenshots, and instant exports for polished product demos, tutorials.

posts.name: Roley
posts.tagline: API Testing tool built for Teams
posts.description: Build, test, and manage APIs all in one powerful workspace. Roley.io is a faster, cleaner, and more affordable alternative to Postman, designed for modern development teams. Streamline API testing, collaboration, documentation, and project management with a developer-first experience.

posts.name: AI Web Scraper Builder
posts.tagline: Lovable for Scrapers
posts.description: Create production-ready web scraper code in minutes with AI. Paste URLs and our AI analyzes the page structure, maps selectors, and writes complete scraper code in Python, Node.js, Scrapy, Playwright & more. Free trial available.

posts.name: Tiger Finder AI Profile Classifier
posts.tagline: Filter real human creators on TikTok, skip everything else
posts.description: TikTok creator search, minus the shops, charities, communities, organizations, and any other account that isn't an individual creator. Use Tiger Finder to achieve 10x more effective results than the traditional influencer search.

posts.name: Kakunin
posts.tagline: Cryptographic identity for autonomous AI agents
posts.description: AI agents are making real decisions — executing trades, accessing patient data, filing documents. But there's no way to prove what an agent is, what it's allowed to do, or what it actually did. Kakunin fixes that. It issues X.509 certificates to AI agents, monitors their behavior in real time, and auto-revokes access when risk crosses a threshold. Regulator-ready audit reports in one click. Works with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, CAMEL, Mastra, Vercel AI SDK. Python and TypeScript SDKs.

posts.name: Shape Walk
posts.tagline: Walk shapes to stay in shape: gamified fitness tracker
posts.description: Pick a shape. Shape Walk maps it onto your neighborhood map and you walk the outline. Adjust the waypoints to your liking: expand the route, shrink it, make it yours. When ready, start walking — GPS traces your route live, haptics buzz at each key waypoint, and the walk syncs to Apple Health. You can even draft shapes and save them to walk later. Each finished route lands in your traces library. Share your achievement or challenge friends. 15 shapes from triangle to spiral. Free to start.

posts.name: ReachRobin 2.0: Multi-Channel Outreach
posts.tagline: Every Sales Hero Needs a Robin, Across Every Channel
posts.description: Run your entire outbound (LinkedIn, Email, and WhatsApp) from one place, with pricing based on results, not credits. Robin finds the right prospects based on your ICP, drafts messages in your voice, and sends them out while respecting each platform's limits, so your accounts stay 100% safe. Just show up for the real conversations, while Robin does everything from research and enrichment to follow-ups!

posts.name: contxt.to
posts.tagline: Share context with your team and their AI - in one link.
posts.description: You spent an hour explaining your project to ChatGPT. Now your teammate needs the same context in Claude. Your client wants their AI briefed too. So everyone starts over from scratch. contxt.to fixes that. Paste your notes, briefs, or AI chat summaries, and get one clean link carrying the full context. Share it in Slack, email, or any AI tool. Humans and models get the same structured understanding instantly - no forwarded exports, no “let me summarize first,” no repeated onboarding.

posts.name: Syncaut
posts.tagline: The automation platform built for e-commerce agencies
posts.description: Most automation tools weren't built for agencies. You get one flat account, no client separation, and you're rebuilding the same workflows from scratch every time a new client comes in. Syncaut fixes that. Every client gets their own workspace. Build a workflow once, save it as a template, deploy it to every client in seconds. Flat pricing — unlimited workspaces, unlimited workflows. No per-task fees, no AI markup. Bring your own API keys.

posts.name: DecisionBox for Microsoft SQL Server
posts.tagline: Connect DecisionBox to your MSSQL to validate findings
posts.description: Connect DecisionBox to your Microsoft SQL Server — on-prem, in the cloud, or Azure SQL. The agent writes its own SQL, validates every finding against your data, and ships a ranked backlog — no prompting. Read-only by SQL Server logins, encrypted by default. Open source, AGPL v3.

posts.name: AI Product Adoption Deck
posts.tagline: 12 diagnostics, 80 action cards, 12 workshops - one workflow
posts.description: Most AI products fail after the first use. Not because the model is bad — because the product decisions around it are. The AI Product Adoption Deck is 104 cards for the moments where adoption breaks: empty prompts, trust gaps, correction loops, agent anxiety, retention drop-off. Each card carries a diagnosis, an action, and a workshop. Drop the PDF into Claude or ChatGPT and get card-level answers on your own product. 124 pages. One-time purchase. Includes a SKILL.md file for any LLM.

posts.name: Multiplayer Debugging Agent
posts.tagline: Connect your coding agent to prod and fix bugs automatically
posts.description: Multiplayer runs locally alongside tools like Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot. From there, it feeds your agent the full-stack, pre-correlated, and unsampled data and context observability tools miss. Operating with a secure, local-first approach, we intelligently deduplicate issues to eliminate review fatigue. Multiplayer replaces log grepping and "PR slop" with a handful of high-quality, automated pull requests.

posts.name: DepsGuard
posts.tagline: Configure once, prevent the next compromised package install
posts.description: Prevent the next npm supply chain compromise like the GitHub, axios, @tanstack attacks from impacting you. One command to scan and fix npm, pnpm, yarn, bun, and uv configs using security best practices. Free and open source (MIT), 100% Rust, zero dependencies, brought to you by the AppSec experts at Arnica.

posts.name: Lumio
posts.tagline: Personalized audio bedtime stories for kids - powered by AI
posts.description: Lumio is a web app that generates short, personalized audio bedtime stories for children based on a simple idea. Each story is tailored to the child’s age, interests, and even language preferences, with different narrator voices available. It’s designed for parents of young kids (roughly ages 2–8) who struggle to come up with engaging bedtime stories or want an easier, more creative way to make storytelling fun and personalized.

posts.name: HiveMind
posts.tagline: Your team's AI knowledge base, connected to Slack
posts.description: Every team has people who remember everything — how that bug got fixed, why you switched databases. Everyone else asks them. All day. HiveMind turns your Slack and files into a searchable knowledge base. Ask in plain English, get answers with sources. Seniors get their afternoons back. New hires ramp in days, not months.

posts.name: Mortgage50 – Affordability Calculator
posts.tagline: Turn mortgage website traffic into qualified leads
posts.description: Mortgage50 is a modern U.S. home affordability calculator for mortgage lenders and brokers. Many mortgage websites still use outdated calculators that don't engage visitors or help convert traffic into leads. Mortgage50 solves this with a fast, lightweight widget that can be embedded into any website. It can be branded to match your site and configured with a custom call-to-action to capture leads. Our goal is simple: increase engagement, build trust, and generate more qualified leads.

posts.name: brew-browser
posts.tagline: The Homebrew GUI Mac users have been waiting for.
posts.description: Homebrew has 13,000+ packages and zero great GUIs. brew-browser is a real native macOS app (Tauri 2 + Svelte 5, not Electron) that makes the whole catalog browsable, installable, and beautiful. Pre-baked AI-generated descriptions and categories for every package, magic search that understands "video player" → VLC.Offline-first, MIT-licensed, zero telemetry, zero accounts.

posts.name: Agent Studio

Customize agents for each task, curate project knowledge in a built-in context library, switch smoothly between workspaces, and follow the entire pipeline as agents plan, execute, ask questions, generate artifacts, request approval, and prepare final work for review. It brings context, agents, approvals, and project history into one local workspace hub for teams.

posts.name: Converrt Any
posts.tagline: Convert any file to any format, entirely offline
posts.description: Convert videos, audio, documents, images, and archives across 200+ formats entirely offline. No uploads, no privacy concerns, just fast local file conversion.

posts.description: AFK streams local terminal sessions to your phone or browser without SSH, VPN, or inbound access to your computer. Supervise Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, builds, logs, tests, deploys, and shell sessions from anywhere. Try on the web: https://getafk.dev/login/?step=email

Play or sing along with real-time pitch feedback, scoring, progress tracking, and social competition. Built for orchestra, choir, and band students - not just piano or guitar. Turn isolated practice into something interactive, rewarding, and fun.

posts.name: Retrodex
posts.tagline: Retro Game Encyclopedia and Collection Tracking App
posts.description: Catalog 12,000+ classic games across 24 consoles. AI cartridge ID, UPC scanning, market prices, cheat codes — all 100% offline, no account required. Available on iOS and Android.

posts.description: The personal finance dashboard Europe doesn't have yet. Log in once with eVerify, see everything: pensions, mortgages, investments, child funds. Simulate any decision before you make it. Interactive prototype, looking for real feedback from real users.

posts.name: SoundBoardio

posts.description: SoundBoardio is a free, github-driven app where you can make your own soundboards. Each SoundBoard is fully installable to your device and looks like a real application! posts.name: Tracelit

Session replay, traces, logs, and metrics in one place — and then Tracelit actually fixes it. Built for teams who ship fast and can't babysit production

posts.name: DataGrout Invariant

Integrate Invariant into your agent’s workflow to empower self-correction, bug prevention, and high-quality, secure code delivery, every time.

It helps women know when to push, modify or recover, and gives real-time adjustments for weight, reps, exercises and intensity with clear “why” explanations.

Real products, from one sentence.
